# QoF v1.4.0's Changelog

> [!NOTE]
> A Minecraft Bedrock addon that adds small vanilla-friendly features. Each module is configurable through the in-game pack settings panel. Requires **BetaAPIs** enabled under Experiments.

## Pack Info

Full changelog: [v1.4.0](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/commits/v1.4.0) or [compare](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/compare/v1.3.0...v1.4.0) Releases: [v1.4.0](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.4.0) LICENSE: [MIT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/LICENSE)\
Release Date: [Apr/02/2026 (23:59:36)](https://time.is/Unix_time_converter/1775174376)

Base Game Version: [26.12](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/44732288765837-Minecraft-Bedrock-Edition-26-12-Hotfix-Changelog)\
Dependency: [2.7.0@beta](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@minecraft/server/v/2.7.0-beta.1.26.10-stable)

## Changelogs

### (New) Double Door

- Players can now interact with one door to instantly open the adjacent door

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.4.0/doubledoor.gif" alt="double door qof's features showcase" width="1080">
</div>

### Dynamic Light

- Dynamic lights now process using a round-robin batch system for better overall performance
- Dynamic lights are no longer saved in dynamic properties. All lights now exist only in memory

> All dynamic lights created before this update that were stored in dynamic properties will be migrated automatically

### Harvest

- Auto-replant now supports `Cocoa Bean`. Players can harvest it using an axe
- Players can place seeds in their offhand, and the system will prioritize seeds from the offhand when replanting!

### Composter+

- Added `Golden Dandelion` to the custom compostable item list

### Offhand

- Players can now plant all seed types from their offhand
- `Jukebox` now requires the player to sneak when placing a torch
- The offhand system now includes a larger list of items that cannot be used in the offhand if they are held in the main hand

> bug ref
>
> While the player is eating food in the main hand, they cannot place a torch from the offhand

### Recipe+

- Removed the recipes that allow transfer between stone and quartz-related stone in the stone cutter
- Created the subcategories of the furnace recipe folder
- Added dye recipes to solve the hardly obtainable color, e.g. green, brown dye

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.4.0/BO_B.png" alt="double door qof's features showcase" width="357">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.4.0/RG_B.png" alt="double door qof's features showcase" width="357">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.4.0/YB_G.png" alt="double door qof's features showcase" width="357">
</div>

- Flowers can increase in the inventory for saving time usage

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.4.0/poppy.png" alt="Combining Red Tulip and Bone Meal to x4 Red Tulips in Inventory" width="1080">
</div>

**alt-text**: Combining `Red Tulip` and `Bone Meal` to `x4 Red Tulips` in the _Inventory_

### Bug Fixes

- While the player is eating food in the main hand, they cannot place a torch from the offhand

# Pre-release Changelogs (v1.3.x)

All updates from pre-releases are included in the v1.4.0 release.

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.3.1 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.3.1">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.3.1

- `javascript` and `json` files are now automatically minified before release to reduce file size
- `_notes.md` added to the root directory of both `behavior_packs` and `resource_packs`
- Added more images and GIFs to `README.md`
- Updated `banner` and `pack_icon` by @pickerth-12

### Carried Container

- Players can no longer carry `lit_*` blocks `(e.g. Furnace, Blast Furnace, Smoker)`

### Dynamic Light

- `LIGHT_REDUCE_LINEAR` default value increased to `2` (previously `1`) so light decays faster
- Some items that previously could not emit light underwater now check the player head position when touching water and the feet position while swimming
- Dynamic Light files have been split into:
  - `light.js` for the main dynamic light logic
  - `light_patcher.js` for bug fixes and workarounds for Minecraft limitations

> ref bug
>
> - Fixed `carrots` and `potatoes` not being placeable on farmland when a dynamic light source is nearby
> - Fixed dynamic light turning `grass path` into `dirt` when near a `grass path`
> - Fixed incorrect `LIGHT_REDUCE_LINEAR` logic in `_store.js`

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `carrots` and `potatoes` not being placeable on farmland when a dynamic light source is nearby
- Fixed dynamic light turning `grass path` into `dirt` when near a `grass path`
- Fixed incorrect `LIGHT_REDUCE_LINEAR` logic in `_store.js`

</details>

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.3.2 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.3.2">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.3.2

### Offhand

> bug ref
>
> - Torches no longer be placed on `qof:light_block`

### Dynamic Light

- Faster startup time due to improved `_restoreFromDYP` restoration logic

> bug ref
>
> - Fixed `large_fern` being incorrectly named `tall_fern`
> - `qof_light_block` no longer produces stone sounds when pushed by a piston
> - Fixed shovel and hoe interactions with `dirt-type` blocks below `qof:light_block` behaving incorrectly, compared to vanilla

### Harvest

> bug ref
>
> - Players in `Creative` gamemode can no longer use hoes for auto-harvest

### Offhand

- `DISALLOWED_ITEM` has been added to prevent swapping certain items into the offhand to avoid previous NBT data loss

### Recipe+

A more accessible way to obtain items

> [!NOTE]
> We forgot to mentioned new recipes in [v1.3.1](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.3.1), here is the re-cap, what been add/changed

#### 1. `Red Sand` to `Glass` (`Blast Furnace`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.3.2/redSand_glass.png" alt="Smelting red sand to glass in blast furnace" width="1080">
</div>

**alt-text**: Smelting `red sand` to glass in _blast furnace_

#### 2. `Hanging Roots & Dirt` to `Rooted Dirt` (`Craft`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.3.2/rooted_dirt.png" alt="Combining Hanging Roots with Dirt to Dirt in inventory" width="1080">
</div>

**alt-text**: Combining Hanging Roots with Dirt to Rooted Dirt in _inventory_

#### 3. `Chorus Fruit` to `Popped Chorus Fruit` (`Smoker`, `Campfire`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.3.2/pop_campfire.png" alt="Roasting Chorus Fruit to Popped Chorus Fruit in Campfire (also work with Smoker)" width="1080">
</div>

**alt-text**: Roasting `Chorus Fruit` to `Popped Chorus Fruit` in _Campfire_ `(also work with Smoker)`

### Bug Fixes

- Players in `Creative` gamemode can no longer use hoes for auto-harvest
- Torches no longer be placed on `qof:light_block`
- Fixed `large_fern` being incorrectly named `tall_fern`
- `qof_light_block` no longer produces stone sounds when pushed by a piston

</details>

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.3.3 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.3.3">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.3.3

### Carried Container

- `NO_JUMP_HOLD_CHEST` now defaults to `false` _(can still be enabled in the settings panel)_
- Reduced the downward velocity applied while carrying a chest from `-0.02` to `-0.008` per tick

### Offhand

- `Flint and Steel` and `Fire Charge` can now be used from the offhand

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.3.3/fire.png" alt="using flint and steal from offhand" width="1080">
</div>

### Dynamic Light

> bug ref
>
> - Fixed an issue where creating a `grass path` with a `shovel` near a `dynamic light source` could turn the path into dirt

### Recipe+

- Adjusted stonecutter recipes to provide a fair stair conversion rate

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/.github/img/v1.3.3/stonecutter.png" alt="Convert Spruce Plank to Spruce Stairs in stonecutter" width="1080">
</div>

**alt-text**: Convert `Spruce Plank` to `Spruce Stairs` in _stonecutter_

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed an issue where creating a `grass path` with a `shovel` near a `dynamic light source` could turn the path into dirt

</details>

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.3.4 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.3.4">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.3.4

> [!NOTE]
> _**Dev Note** Quick note before anything else - I found a workaround that significantly reduces the size of `dynamic properties` of dynamic lights.\
> This might replace the current pre-release, and I may ship it directly as `v1.4.0`_

### Offhand

> bug ref
>
> - While consuming food, a torch held in the offhand will no longer be placed

- While consuming food, a torch held in the offhand will no longer be placed
